title: Throws exception if a SQL/GIS takes argument null
poc: create table geom(id int, g Geometry);
select id, mbr(g) from geom where id=1 or id=2;
select id, mbr(g) from geom where;
key_bug_features: SQL/GIS function fails with null argument
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE geom_test(id INT PRIMARY KEY, g Geometry, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO geom_test VALUES(1, GeomFromText('POINT(4 5)', 0), 'Point geometry');
INSERT INTO geom_test VALUES(2, GeomFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 10 0, 10 10, 0 10, 0 0))', 0), 'Polygon geometry');
INSERT INTO geom_test VALUES(3, NULL, 'Null geometry');
SELECT id, mbr(g) FROM geom_test WHERE g IS NOT NULL;
